examples: This means that social chimpanzees are smarter than solitary orangutan.
Orangutan mothers face up to eight years of single parenthood raising their infants.
When people talk about getting an all-over tan for summer, they're not usually talking about getting an all-over orangutan.
Cushy cabins also have excellent views of lowland rainforest and are located near orangutan nests.
Bahasha gave birth on Monday in the outside enclosure, a week after Jantho, an orangutan was born.
